transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Start from the baseline assignment and focus on the listed conflicting edges first; many likely come from a small set of high-degree nodes. Use the 4-color freedom to recolor a few hubs and their neighborhoods while preserving already-good regions. Aim for a fully valid 4-coloring rather than incremental conflict reduction, since the graph is 4-colorable. Prioritize nodes appearing in multiple conflicts: N04, N12, N20, N28, N03, N06, N08, N11, N22, N30. After one improved candidate is found, verify all edges against the assignment and only then stop.
